ReviewManagement Best Practices

ReviewManagement Core Strategy including: Review collection - collection PlatformProductReview, Unified backend management; Review analysis - analysisReview emotion (positive, negative, sexual), identifyReviewkey words (quality, Logistics, Price), solution customerfeedback; ReviewResponse——timelinessResponseReview, especially negative Review, ImprovementCustomer Satisfaction; Reviewwarning——warning negative Review, timelinessprocessing negative Word of Mouth, to avoid Word of Mouth deterioration; Word of Mouthoptimization——based ReviewanalysisoptimizationProductWord of Mouth, for quality negative ReviewoptimizationProductquality, for Logistics negative ReviewoptimizationLogistics effect.

E-Commerce EnterpriseschoiceReviewManagementSystem, FocusConsideration element: FirstReview collection coverage, covering EnterprisesOperations department Platform, Review collection Stable; SecondReviewanalysisdepth, Review sentiment analysis, Reviewkey word extraction precision; ThirdReviewResponseconvenience degree, ReviewResponseconvenience, support batch Response; FourthReviewwarningtimeliness, negative Reviewwarningtimeliness; FifthWord of MouthoptimizationCapability, base ReviewanalysisoptimizationProductWord of Mouth; SixthMulti-channelReviewManagement, ChannelReviewUnifiedManagement.
